summary: Frontend testing for unified Rakennus construction type preset behavior. 6/6 tests passed. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rakennus preset refactor complete and working. All 'rakennus' type presets now close modal immediately and configuration options (Karkass, Villa, Kipsi) are editable only in TakeoffPanel's ConstructionOptionsEditor.

tests_executed.test: Rectangle tool - Rakennus preset (Kuivatila AK rakennus) closes modal immediately
tests_executed.details: Clicking 'Kuivatila AK rakennus' in ToolPresetSelector closes modal without showing configuration options

tests_executed.test: Rectangle tool - Non-Rakennus preset (Pölysidonta) closes modal immediately
tests_executed.details: Non-rakennus presets also close modal directly as expected

tests_executed.test: Rectangle tool - 'Muu' (custom) preset shows name input dialog
tests_executed.details: Clicking 'Muu' shows input with placeholder 'Anna nimi...' for custom naming

tests_executed.test: Wall tool - Kipsiseinä rakennus preset closes modal immediately
tests_executed.details: Wall tool rakennus presets also work correctly without showing config options

tests_executed.test: ConstructionOptionsEditor appears in TakeoffPanel edit mode
tests_executed.details: When editing a measurement with constructionType, 'Rakennus asetukset' panel shows with Karkass, Villa, Kipsi dropdowns

tests_executed.test: Price recalculation and label update when changing construction options
tests_executed.details: Changed Karkass→Metalliranka (+0€), Villa→Villalla (+5€), Kipsi→2x (+10€). Price updated from 35€ to 50€. Label updated to 'Kuivatila AK, metalliranka, villalla, 2x kipsi'
